scripts.build: html-minifier-terser --input-dir src --output-dir dist --file-ext html --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-css true --minify-js true && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');if(!fs.existsSync('dist'))fs.mkdirSync('dist');fs.readdirSync('src').filter(f=>/\.(png|jpg|jpeg|svg|ico)$/i.test(f)).forEach(f=>{fs.copyFileSync(path.join('src',f),path.join('dist',f));console.log('Copied '+f);})"
